title: Thermal-Foregoing
body:
# About
This resource pack is a retexture for [Industrial Foregoing](https://modrinth.com/mod/industrial-foregoing). The new textures follow Thermal Series' style, giving you an entirely new look.

![# About This resource pack is a retexture for [Industrial Foregoing](https://modrinth.com/mod/industrial-foregoing). The new textures follow Thermal Series' style, giving you an entirely new look.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0745ec473d9349b493b4eb002e01f7bd25ef73ca.png)
